description: Processes meeting transcripts and raw meeting content to produce structured meeting minutes artifacts. Handles transcript ingestion, speaker identification, action item extraction, and canonical minutes record generation.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Comment resolution logic — that belongs to workflow_modules.comment_resolution
Storing domain allocation or regulatory data — that belongs to domain_modules
Lifecycle enforcement and governance — that belongs to the control_plane
